video_id: How to Add an Emergency Contact
title: How To Add An Emergency Contact

segments.text: How to add an emergency contact from your home page on your employee space, navigate
to your profile on the left hand menu.
Once there you're going to go to your personal tab.
From here, you're going to scroll down until you see the emergency contacts card.
You can either open the card by clicking on this arrow or you can click on the plus sign
to immediately add a contact, that's what we're going to do.
The effective day can just simply be today's date, whatever that is, and then you're
going to add your contact information.
You can put a relationship if you would like, and you can select this contact to be
your preferred contact.
In the preferred contact method, you're going to choose one of these.
For this purpose, we're going to choose the mobile phone.
You can put in a home phone work phone, I'm just going to put in a mobile phone, and you
always have to choose the country or jurisdiction code.
Then you're going to put in the number.
You can certainly add more information if you would like to, but I'm just going to add
the phone number, and then I'm going to click Submit.
Then your contact shows up on the emergency contact card, and it'll show that it's preferred.
You can continue adding other contacts.
Say you want to add just another contact, but they're not necessarily your preferred.
They're not the primary one, and let's say this is a phone number, or I'm sorry, a
phone number, and add whatever information you want to, and then submit, and then that
person will come up as another contact, but Sherry will still be listed as your primary
or preferred, and that's how you add an emergency contact.
